title: ctenodon histrix var. multijugus
intro: Ctenodon histrix var. multijugus, also known as the many-jug plant, is a variety of the Ctenodon histrix plant, which belongs to the family Celastraceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ctenodon histrix var. multijugus include reducing fever, treating rheumatism, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
